title: Jamai Badal
overview: This is the love story of Krish, son of Advocate Gourisankar Chakladar. Gourisankar has two sons, Harisankar and Krish. Harisankar is an advocate like his father but the younger son Krish is very casual in life, doesn't like working even though his father has given him a factory to handle.
